reviews.comment:
Esta ypf es totalmente necesaria en pleno belgrano. La atención es muy buena. El estado en general es muy bueno también.

(Translated by Google)
This YPF station is absolutely essential in the heart of Belgrano. The service is excellent. The station is also in very good condition.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrN3Z1U2xBRRAB

reviews.comment:
En Esta estacion de servicio cargue 500$ y me estafaron porq no carga lo q tiene q ser en el turno de noche.pareciera q se cargo 200$ .' Fui a reclamar y ellos mismos me volvieron a cargar 200$ mas y tampoco levanto el medidor de carga... En una palabra te estafan con la carga de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
At this gas station I filled up with $500 and they scammed me because they didn't fill up what they were supposed to fill up during the night shift. It seemed like they charged $200. I went to complain and they charged me another $200 and the fuel gauge didn't work either... In short, they scam you with your fuel fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrb3FEWi1nRRAB

reviews.comment: Agustin Cabrera, sales rep at the office inside the building, provided one of the WORST customer experiences I've had in years. Rude, lack of interest to the client, zero empathy. It made me to not wish ever coming back again 👎👎👎👎
